treatment_information.treatment_response: Successful in removing fluid; patient weight decreased to 204 pounds by discharge.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for exacerbation of heart failure and fluid retention.
Patient's weight reduced to 204 pounds by discharge.
Tracheostomy was replaced after it was coughed out.

patient_outcome.final_status: Patient was discharged to an extended care facility.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Appointment with Dr ___ has already been arranged.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient requires assistance for ambulation, uses a walker or cane.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient required monitoring of weight post-discharge and instructed to call the clinic if weight gain exceeded 3 lbs.
